description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the opensuse/tumbleweed Docker image with a before_script that runs 'zypper -q install -y git'. Define a single stage called build and add two jobs, Linux_x64 and Win64, both in this stage. In the Linux_x64 job execute 'zypper -q install -y find libgit2-devel make gcc gcc-c++ qt6-concurrent-devel qt6-core-devel qt6-gui-devel qt6-quickcontrols2-devel qt6-base-devel qt6-qml-devel qt6-quick-devel qt6-quick-private-devel quazip-qt6-devel ninja', then 'make -f CI.mk linuxdeploy' and 'make -f CI.mk finalize', and publish an artifact named GitAddonsManager_Linux_x64-$CI_COMMIT_SHA containing the GitAddonsManager directory. In the Win64 job execute 'zypper -q install -y find wine-staging wine-staging-32bit wget make p7zip tar gzip git || true', then 'make -f CI.mk windeploy' and 'make -f CI.mk finalize', cache the Qt/, wine, and libgit2-0.27.2 paths, and publish an artifact named GitAddonsManager_Win64-$CI_COMMIT_SHA containing the GitAddonsManager directory.
